title: Mike's Way
description:
You are a visitor to a strange land.
Waking up at a gas station you look around and gather some provisions and bags before you set off into the world.

You come across many forgotten ruins and abandoned cities. You gather supplies and get stronger.
body:
Download Custom Songpack here: [Dropbox](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/beat77gi9adot6nktz0eq/Mike-s-Way-Songpack.zip?rlkey=4gq15w2wckecbqzs5hoscjtwi&dl=0) (goes in Resource Packs folder)

Enable shaders! Select Mike's Way or Potato Mike's Way!


![Mike's Way](https://i.imgur.com/vyriZN7.png)

                                              **Mike's Way**
============================================================

                                                                    A world of exploration and adventure awaits.  
                                                                                      Discover new biomes, creatures, monsters, and treasures.  
                                                                                                           Befriend villagers and expand towns.  
                                                                                                                             Explore ancient ruins and past civilizations.

 

**__What is Mike's Way?__**
---------------------------

Mike's Way is my own custom pack which features mods I particularly enjoy. Beyond that this pack is designed to work well as a whole, while focusing on community building with villagers.  
There is a lot of loot and treasure to be found, though drop and spawn rates need to be balanced still. Explore! Look around! There's a myriad of new biomes and mobs to encounter!

 

![Spawn](https://i.imgur.com/yXG8xSj.jpeg)

 

**__The Story__**
-----------------

You've grown up in a village in the shadow of an ancient ruin. To you these ruins represent a mysterious past which no longer exists.

You've grown up in the cold climates, with a small community to support you, strange and monstrous creatures prowl the deeps where you regularly fish. . . and sometimes you hear a strange song on the wind.  
You've awoken alone in a place that feels both strange and familiar.  
  
The story is yours, and through in game prompts you'll be able to establish and grow yours.

 

**__Notable Features__**
------------------------

-Pending-

 

**__Intended Gamepath__**
-------------------------

-Pending-

 

### **__Controls__**

WASD: Move  
Space: Jump  
E: Inventory  
T: Chat  
J: Map + map controls  
N: Bookmark/Waypoint

U: Open quests
F: Reload equipped gun

C: Zoom 
R: Exit airship

 

### **__Chat Controls__**

Commands window is for commands. Make sure you are in this window before entering a command - otherwise you will crash your client.  
MineTogether is a chat bridge which works across single player worlds using the same/different modpacks.

### __**Notes**__

The character creation page is JUST for hereditary information/genes should you choose to settle down and start a family. Your minecraft skin is what will always show.

#### **__Known bugs__**

Lootable bodies in cities look like red workbenches.
Zombie Piglins spawn infinitely above the nether ceiling.
Buttons overlap in one menu.
Stone and other materials may "wave" to resolve turn shaders off and on.
